programs.title: Booked: First Day In:1
programs.desc: A teen gets nabbed for being in the wrong place at the wrong time, while a man who left town with a warrant gets caught when he returns for his aunt's funeral and faces a one million dollar bail.

programs.title: City Confidential:8
programs.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programs.title: Evil Up Close:6 E10 -Kids Who Kill
programs.desc: Stephen Hough got away with raping and killing 16-year-old Janet Cummings. He fabricated an alibi for his crimes and let an innocent man go to jail. Four decades later, detectives made a breakthrough.

programs.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programs.desc: When gambler Scott Martinez, 47, is found eviscerated by a sword in his La Mesa, CA, home, investigators can't tell who is telling the truth within his inner circle.

programs.title: The First 48:26
programs.desc: Detective Angela Carter takes over the case of a missing teenage girl and wonders if the key to her disappearance could lie shockingly close to home.

programs.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programs.desc: Amid the vibrant chaos of New Orleans' Mardi Gras celebrations, gunshots shatter the festive atmosphere of the French Quarter, leaving a man dead.
